headline: CONFIRMATION. Medicare GLP-1 access agreement (Zepbound capped at $50/month for Medicare; orforglipron pending FDA; Medicaid expansion enabled; ~40M Americans on government insurance benefit) effective April 1 2026 was already absorbed in April 25 baseline (composite 56.3, Functional band). No NEW acute in-window April 25-28 evidence beyond ongoing implementation context. April 1 2026 launch of Foundayo (orforglipron pill) for obesity is supportive ACT/EQU signal but already factored. Composite 56.3 holds.

evidence.finding: Medicare beneficiaries pay no more than $50/month for Zepbound; orforglipron pending FDA; Medicaid expansion enabled; ~40M Americans on government insurance + millions of out-of-pocket beneficiaries.
Foundayo (orforglipron) FDA-approved oral GLP-1 — broadens access compared to injectable formulations.
Most-favored-nation pricing framework with Lilly + Novo Nordisk; potentially expansive but program details retain commercial-friendly self-pay tier ($299-449).
